items.name: chain 💎
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .

items.name: Tarnished General’s Coat [PBR]
items.description:
⚔️ The mark of command, weathered by time.
This deep navy military coat bears golden distress marks across its shoulders and chest — a silent testament to battles fought and won. Ideal for avatars of honor, rebellion, or leadership.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Realistic worn textures with gold patina
Classic officer silhouette with modern edge
Perfect for generals, soldiers, or strategists
PBR materials enhance metallic and fabric realism
🔍 Keywords: coat, navy, gold, military, battle, leader, worn, elegant, realistic, PBR
Victory leaves marks — wear them with pride.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
